page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepBrainNet is a convolutional Neural Network trained for age prediction using a large set of MRI scans from a highly diversified cohort spanning different studies, scanners, ages, ethnicities and geographic locations around the world.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepBrainNet is a convolutional Neural Network trained for age prediction using a large set of MRI scans from a highly diversified cohort spanning different studies, scanners, ages, ethnicities and geographic locations around the world.
